name: Tomato-Topped Spaghetti Pizza
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Fresh tomatoes, core removed, sliced
8 oz Spaghetti, cooked and drained twice
1/4 cup Ripe olives, pitted and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly spray a 12-inch pizza pan with non-stick cooking spray.
3. In a medium bowl, beat the eggs.
4. Add spaghetti, 1/4 cup Parmesan, and oil; toss to coat the spaghetti.
5. Spread spaghetti evenly into the prepared pan.
6. Bake until the spaghetti crust is firm, about 20 minutes. Remove from oven and set aside.
7. In a small bowl, combine mozzarella cheese, Italian seasoning, and remaining 1/4 cup Parmesan.
8. On the spaghetti crust, sprinkle the cheese mixture.
9. Top with reserved tomato slices, pepperoni, green bell pepper, and olives.
10. Sprinkle with the remaining 1/2 cup cheese mixture.
11. Bake until hot and cheese is melted, about 10 minutes. This is a good recipe for a child.
